questionHtml: The variable voltage can be adjusted so that no electrons reach the collecting plate. Write down the minimum value of the voltage for which no electrons reach the collecting plate.
markschemeHtml:
4.9 «V»

 

Allow 5.1 if 10.2 is used in (b)(i).

Ignore sign on answer.

[1 mark]
